subject: Kochi Metro
advice: Most stations are designed for step-free access; confirm station-specific washroom and parking availability.

subject: Fort Kochi heritage area
advice: Uneven pavements, narrow lanes and older buildings can be challenging. A companion or accessible taxi is useful.

subject: LuLu Mall and modern malls
advice: Modern malls are among the most reliable accessible indoor destinations.

subject: Ferries and Water Metro
advice: Ask terminal staff about boarding assistance and current accessibility before travel.
